metadata.title: Local Images Plus
metadata.description: Local Images Plus plugin searches for all external media links in your notes, downloads and saves them locally and adjusts the links in your notes to point to the saved files.

regex.source: .setName("Number of retries for every single attachment")
.setName("Do not create Obsidian attachment folder (For compatibility with other plugins)")
regex.target: .setName("不创建Obsidian附件文件夹（与其他插件兼容）")
.setName("添加原始文件名或'打开文件'标签")
.setName("移动/删除/重命名媒体文件夹")
.setDesc("当页面处理完毕时显示通知。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Do not show additional commands in command palette. Reload the plugin in settings to take effect (turn off/on).")
regex.target: .setDesc("不在命令面板中显示附加命令。在设置中重新加载插件以生效（关闭/开启）。")
.setDesc("在创建/复制/粘贴时处理笔记。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Interval in seconds for processing update. It takes some time to reveal changed content of a note to plugins.")
regex.target: .setDesc("处理更新的时间间隔（秒）。向插件显示笔记更改内容需要一些时间。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If an error occurs during downloading (network etc.) try to re-download several times.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果下载过程中出现错误（如网络问题），尝试重新下载多次。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Process all new created/cloud-synced files with corresponding extensions.")
regex.target: .setDesc("处理所有具有相应扩展名的新创建/云同步文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The plugin will also move all attachements from obsidian default folder to plugin folder.")
regex.target: .setDesc("该插件还将把所有附件从Obsidian默认文件夹移动到插件文件夹。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The plugin will use MD5 when renaming all new attachements.")
regex.target: .setDesc("该插件在重命名所有新附件时将使用MD5。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Download unknown filetypes and save them with .unknown extension.")
regex.target: .setDesc("下载未知文件类型并以.unknown扩展名保存它们。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Convert all downloaded PNG files to JPEG. May reduce file size by several times, but can also affect performance.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将所有下载的PNG文件转换为JPEG。可能会使文件大小减少几倍，但也可能影响性能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Convert all pasted PNG files to JPEG. May reduce file size by several times, but can also affect performance.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将所有粘贴的PNG文件转换为JPEG。可能会使文件大小减少几倍，但也可能影响性能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Do not download files with size less than this value. Set 0 for no limit.")
regex.target: .setDesc("不要下载小于这个值的文件。设置为0表示无限制。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The plugin will not download attachements with these extensions.")
regex.target: .setDesc("该插件不会下载具有这些扩展名的附件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The plugin will not create an Obsidian attachments folder. This may cause the plugin to behave incorrectly. ")
regex.target: .setDesc("该插件不会创建一个Obsidian附件文件夹。这可能导致插件行为异常。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add media links captions to converted tags.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将媒体链接标题添加到转换后的标签。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add [[original filename]] or [original filename](link to attachement) after replaced tag (only for file:// protocol or dropped/pasted files ).")
regex.target: .setDesc("在替换标签后添加[[原始文件名]]或[原始文件名]（链接到附件）（仅适用于file://协议或拖放/粘贴文件）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Include only files matching this regex pattern when running on all notes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在运行所有笔记时只包含匹配此正则表达式的文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Do not move orphaned files into the garbage can.")
regex.target: .setDesc("不要将孤立文件移到回收站。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select whether to write full paths in tags or not.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择是否在标签中写入完整路径。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select where all new attachements will be saved.\nYou can use templates e.g. _resouces/${date}/${notename}")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择所有新附件将保存的位置。\n您可以使用模板例如_resouces/${date}/${notename}")

regex.source: .setDesc("Folder to keep all downloaded media files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于保存所有下载媒体文件的文件夹。")

showBalloon("无法获取当前笔记！", this.settings.showNotifications)
showBalloon(`"${file.path}" 的附件已被处理。`, this.settings.showNotifications)

regex.source: showBalloon(`WARNING!\r\nAttachements for "${file.path}" were processed, but some attachements were not downloaded/replaced...`, this.settings.showNotifications)
regex.target: showBalloon(`警告！\r\n"${file.path}" 的附件已被处理，但有些附件未被下载/替换...`, this.settings.showNotifications)

regex.source: showBalloon(`Page "${file.path}" has been processed, but nothing was changed.`, this.settings.showNotifications)
regex.target: showBalloon(`页面 "${file.path}" 已被处理，但没有任何改变。`, this.settings.showNotifications)

regex.source: showBalloon("Media links were found, processing...", this.settings.showNotifications)
regex.target: showBalloon("发现了媒体链接，正在处理...", this.settings.showNotifications)

regex.source: showBalloon(itemcount + " attachements for note " + note.path + " were processed."
regex.target: showBalloon(itemcount + "个附件以处理，笔记路径为: " + note.path + "."
